case_title: ZACHARY RAPPORT VS. NORMA DELA FUENTE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $699.00 FILED BY RAPPORT, ZACHARY AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTE, NORMA DELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2019 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIF ZACHARY RAPPORT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NORMA DELA FUENTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 24 HOUR FITNESS, REPRESENTED BY LISA LOCKNER, REGIONAL LOSS PREVENTION MANAGER, IS PRESENT. THE COURT STATES TO MS. LOCKNER, THAT BY BEING PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING, 24 HOUR FITNESS HAS AGREED TO BECOME A DEFENDANT IN THIS MATTER. MS. LOCKNER AGREES TO THIS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LISA LOCKNER, REGIONAL LOSS PREVENTION MANAGER FOR 24 HOUR FITNESS FILED BY DEFENDANT FUENTE, NORMA DELA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAPPORT, ZACHARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FUENTE, NORMA DELA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED AUG-12-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTE, NORMA DELA
